declared_constraints: Fail closed on unresolved high-impact ambiguity around approval authority.
Keep the semantic root meaning-only and separate from downstream conformance state.
non_goals: Release UX or API workbench routes in the first ASIR slice.
Release downstream projection manifests or readiness claims.
requested_outcomes: Capture approval-flow intent as a canonical semantic root before compiler release.
Preserve trust-boundary clarity between requester, approver, policy engine, and audit surfaces.
